items: Move every card in a Kanban column to the next column at once with a new button on the column header.
Toggle big mode for the selected item with ⌘E / Ctrl+E — press it to maximize the focused agent or panel, and press it again to return.

Opening a new file, diff, terminal, or Kanban panel for a folder that already has a running agent — like a worktree — now places it right next to that agent in the Overview, instead of at the far end of the repo's cluster.
